props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Optionally add a close button to alert and allow it to self dismisss.

props.name: transition
props.description: Set whether the alert fades in and out when it is shown and hidden. Set to `false` to make it appear and disappear without a fade animation.

props.name: variant
props.description: Set the alert variant to a solid.

props.name: visible
props.description: Toggle the visibility of alert component.

events.name: close
events.description: Event fired when the component requests to be closed.

events.name: closed
events.description: Event fired after the alert has been closed and the CSS transition has completed.
